nodes.label: Tests for worker progress parsing, warning detection, and coord stop.
Create a minimal git repo with one commit so worktrees can be created.
A mid-write incomplete JSON line must be silently skipped, not raise.          T
Backward compat: non-stream-json logs still parsed by old STATUS regex.
Some workers put the "(none — ...)" on the line after the         SMOKE_TESTS: h
Graceful degradation: a log with no SMOKE_TESTS block at all         returns Non
Worker emitted SMOKE_TESTS:/END_SMOKE_TESTS with nothing         between — treat
Workers occasionally redo their summary if they reconsider         the change.
Workers may use `* ` instead of `- ` for bullets.  Both         styles parse ide
